mapper.select: select fr.id as requestId, fr.from_user_id as fromUserId, u.nickname as fromUserNickname, u.avatar as fromUserAvatar, fr.message as message, fr.created_time as createdTime, fr.status as status from friend_request fr left join user u on fr.from_user_id = u.id where fr.to_user_id = #{currentUserId} and fr.status = 0 order by fr.created_time desc

select fr.id as requestId, fr.to_user_id as toUserId, u.nickname as toUserNickname, u.avatar as toUserAvatar, fr.message as message, fr.created_time as createdTime, fr.status as status from friend_request fr left join user u on fr.to_user_id = u.id where fr.from_user_id = #{currentUserId} order by fr.created_time desc
